channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sokoto Council Chairman Resigns Over Administrative Challenges
item.description: Hon. Isa Kalanjeni, Executive Chairman of Tangaza Local Government Area in Sokoto State, has resigned from his post and the All Progressives Congress (APC) due to administrative challenges and persona...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Continues Witness Hearings on Justice System Allegations
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry, which is investigating allegations of criminality, political interference, and corruption within the criminal justice system, is set to hear further witness testimo...

item.title: Former Justice Adolfo Azcuna Opposes Raising Conviction Threshold for Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: Former Supreme Court associate justice Adolfo Azcuna has stated that there is no immediate need to raise the 16-vote conviction threshold required to convict Vice President Sara Duterte before the Sup...

item.title: Analysis of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Betting Favorites and Value Picks at The Renaissance Club
item.description: The article provides a detailed betting preview for the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open at The Renaissance Club in North Berwick, Scotland, an event co-sanctioned by the PGA TOUR and DP World Tour that ser...

item.title: Ontario Colleges Skip Efficiency Reviews Amid Financial Challenges
item.description: Six of Ontario’s publicly-funded colleges chose not to apply to a government fund designed to identify operational efficiencies, including Conestoga College, which faces severe financial turmoil. The ...

item.title: Kisumu Activists Skip Saba Saba Protests Over Security Fears
item.description: Kisumu activists have called off planned protests during the Saba Saba commemorations due to fears of violence and criminal infiltration. Human rights defenders like Willy Otiende and Brenda Beverly e...

item.title: Climate Change Alters Predator-Prey Dynamics in Owl Populations
item.description: A study published in *Ecography* reveals how climate change is reshaping predator-prey interactions in the semi-arid Bosque Fray Jorge National Park in Chile. Over 24 years (1990–2015), researchers ob...

item.title: Madlanga Commission to Decide on Private Testimony Request in South Africa
item.description: The Madlanga Commission, established to investigate major drug-related crimes in South Africa, is set to make a ruling on a businessman's request to testify behind closed doors. The applicant, referre...

item.title: Pakistan stock market plummets due to US-Iran tensions and geopolitical uncertainty
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) benchmark KSE-100 index plummeted by over 4,864 points during intraday trade on Wednesday, dropping 2.61% to 181,391.19 from the previous close of 186,255.55. The sha...

item.title: SpaceX Successfully Deploys 81 Satellites via Falcon 9 Launch
item.description: On July 7, 2026, SpaceX executed the Transporter-17 mission, launching 81 satellites aboard a Falcon 9 rocket from Vandenberg Space Force Base in California. The launch occurred at 3:12 a.m. ET, marki...

item.title: ADC Announces Deputy Governorship Candidate for 2027 Election in Rivers State
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) in Rivers State has officially nominated Mr. David Amapakaye Okumgba as its deputy governorship candidate for the upcoming 2027 election. The announcement was mad...

item.title: New Weight-Loss Pill Shows Superior Efficacy in Clinical Trial Compared to Oral Ozempic
item.description: A new once-daily weight-loss pill called orforglipron demonstrated better weight loss and blood sugar improvements than the leading oral semaglutide (Ozempic) in a 52-week phase 3 clinical trial invol...

item.title: Leila De Lima Clarifies Voting Threshold Issue in Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: Rep. Leila de Lima, leading the House impeachment prosecution against Vice President Sara Duterte, stated that the legal team is still deliberating whether to challenge the Senate's decision to requir...

item.title: Regime Change Often Leads to Instability Rather Than Democracy
item.description: This article critically examines the consequences of foreign intervention in sovereign states, arguing that regime changes rarely achieve their intended goals of promoting democracy. Through historica...

item.title: Kejriwal seeks clarity on E20 fuel impact from automakers over safety concerns
item.description: Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal has written to 29 automobile manufacturers to seek written clarification on the impact of E20 ethanol-blended fuel on vehicle mileage and engine safety. During a p...

item.title: McConnell's Hospitalization Threatens Trump's Military Spending Agenda
item.description: U.S. Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) remains hospitalized with no expected return to Congress, creating a critical obstacle for Donald Trump's military spending agenda. As chair of the S...

item.title: National Unity Through Shared Purpose: Lessons from England’s World Cup Victory
item.description: The article explores how England's World Cup victory against Mexico sparked a rare moment of national unity, highlighting the power of shared purpose over shared ancestry. It argues that collective pr...

item.title: Father Troy Bobbin, beloved parish priest, passes away after cancer battle
item.description: Father Troy Bobbin, the parish priest of Holy Spirit Catholic Church in Amaroo, has died after complications from cancer treatment. The Archdiocese of Canberra and Goulburn confirmed his passing at Ca...

item.title: Naira Depreciates to ₦1,379 Per Dollar
item.description: The Nigerian Naira continued its decline against the US Dollar, with the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) reporting an indicative exchange rate of ₦1,379 per dollar on July 8, 2026. This marks a slight i...

item.title: Nigel Farage Faces Credibility Crisis Amid Financial Scrutiny
item.description: Nigel Farage's political career faces significant challenges as he navigates financial scrutiny and questions about his credibility. The Reform UK leader resigned as an MP to trigger a byelection in C...
